fontsUnused: InterVariable-Italic.woff2 (387976 B) — no italic-sans render path exists: Chip.svelte and FittedTitleCanvas.svelte use upright Inter only; no .font-sans + italic / font-style:italic on a sans element anywhere
topOpportunities: Inter is dead weight: the two InterVariable faces are 740,216 B (80% of all font bytes) yet Inter is only the SANS FALLBACK after Fraunces. Real Inter call sites are just 2 — FittedTitleCanvas.svelte (canvas ctx.font, does not need a preloaded webfont) and Chip.svelte (var(--font-sans) fallback). The active UI runs on Fraunces+Cormorant+Plex. Drop or subset Inter to reclaim ~700KB+.

Preload mismatch: app.html preloads InterVariable.woff2 (352KB) which is NOT the primary render font — Fraunces (the html-level --font-serif default) IS preloaded which is correct, but the Inter preload forces a 352KB high-priority download for a fallback face. Remove the InterVariable preload; it competes with Fraunces/Plex for early bandwidth.

InterVariable-Italic.woff2 (388KB) is fully unused at runtime — italics are served by Cormorant (--font-serif-italic, used in 8 filter/calendar components). No sans-italic render path exists. It is downloaded only if some element resolves Inter+italic, which never happens. Safe to delete.

Fraunces.woff2 is 120,788 B for a variable face spanning weight 300–700 with SOFT+opsz axes. It is the LCP-blocking display font (preloaded, font-display:swap). Subsetting to the Latin glyphs actually used (titles/headings are English film/cinema names) could cut it substantially; verify SOFT/opsz axes are retained.

Both Inter @font-face families are double-declared: 'Inter Variable' AND 'Inter' point at the same two woff2 files (app.css lines 11-41) — 4 @font-face rules, 2 unique files. Collapsing to one family name removes redundant declarations and any chance of double-fetch.

CLS risk: 6 still lack width/height — FilmCard.svelte:67, ReachableResults.svelte:97, routes/search/+page.svelte:52, routes/watchlist/+page.svelte:132 & :181, routes/letterboxd/+page.svelte:195. (Cards DesktopHybridCard/MobileFilmRow and the film-detail poster already have width+height+srcset+fetchpriority, so the original 'cards lack attrs' note is largely stale — these 6 list/route images are the real gap.)

No prerender/ssr/csr directives anywhere and no manualChunks in vite.config.ts — adding `export const prerender = true` to static routes (e.g. /cinemas index, /map shell) and a small manualChunks split for the MapLibre GL dependency would cut TTFB and keep the map bundle off the calendar critical path.

Global compiled CSS is 39,111 B raw / 7,887 B gzip in _layout.CRBW05CB.css — healthy but it is the single largest CSS asset and ships on every route. The @theme block defines a full spacing+type+radius scale and 6 soft-display-* opsz helper classes; Tailwind 4 should tree-shake unused utilities, but the hand-written helper classes (soft-display-144/96/72/...) are worth auditing for actual usage to trim the always-loaded layer.
notes: Measured on disk, grounded in file contents. FONTS (frontend/static/fonts, woff2): InterVariable 352,240 B, InterVariable-Italic 387,976 B, Fraunces 120,788 B, Cormorant-Italic 38,140 B, IBMPlexMono 14,708 B, IBMPlexMono-500 14,888 B = 928,740 B total (~907 KB), slightly above the 916KB estimate. PER-FACE USAGE (grep of frontend/src): Fraunces/--font-serif/font-display = html default + 39 files (heavy, primary). Cormorant/--font-serif-italic = 8 filter+calendar components via font-style:italic (real use). IBM Plex Mono 400 = ~30 files via --font-mono-plex/--font-mono; the 500 cut is justified by 3 font-weight:500 mono call sites (FilmSidebar.svelte:113,183; DesktopHybridCard.svelte:217). Inter (both faces) = body SANS FALLBACK only, 2 real call sites: FittedTitleCanvas.svelte (canvas ctx.font, not a CSS webfont dependency) and Chip.svelte (var(--font-sans) fallback). app.css declares Inter under TWO family names ('Inter Variable' + 'Inter') = 4 @font-face rules over 2 files. PRELOAD set in app.html: InterVariable.woff2, Fraunces.woff2, IBMPlexMono.woff2 (3 of 6 faces; the InterVariable preload is misdirected since Inter is only a fallback). GLOBAL CSS: compiled _layout.CRBW05CB.css = 39,111 B raw / 7,887 B gzip (matches baseline; the 8,067 B src/app.css is the pre-Tailwind source). BUILD: frontend/.svelte-kit/output/client exists but is empty (only fonts/ + .vite); compiled assets live in .svelte-kit/output/server/_app/immutable/assets — largest CSS after layout: _page.vRFOBXO7.css 23,171 B, _page.Cp4kzvbt.css 11,800 B, _page.hTd94s6_.css 10,720 B. No client immutable JS chunks were emitted in this partial build, so the 'tiny JS chunks' claim could not be re-measured from output. CONFIG: vite.config.ts has no manualChunks; svelte.config.js uses adapter-vercel with rune mode; no prerender/ssr/csr exports found. CORRECTION to baseline: the 'several card lack loading/width/height' claim is mostly stale — calendar cards and the film-detail poster are fully attributed; the genuine gaps are 6 list/route images (see opportunity 6). font-variation-settings in html uses nested-quote syntax '\"SOFT\" 100' which is non-standard and likely ignored by browsers (low-priority correctness note, not sized here).
